@graph.name: Toolaze AI Hairstyle Changer
@graph.description: Upload one portrait, choose a visual hairstyle preset, edit the prompt, and preview a new hairstyle concept online.

@graph.name: How to Change Your Hairstyle with AI

step.name: Upload one clear portrait
step.text: Choose a front-facing or near-front-facing photo where the full hair shape and hairline are visible.

step.name: Pick a hairstyle preset
step.text: Select a visual hairstyle such as Layered Bob, Beach Waves, Taper Fade, Curly Crop, or Buzz Cut.

step.name: Edit the prompt and generate
step.text: Add details about length, fringe, volume, curls, or what should remain unchanged, then generate and refine the preview.

mainEntity.name: How does an AI hairstyle changer work?

acceptedAnswer.text: It uses an uploaded portrait as a reference and follows the selected hairstyle preset plus an editable prompt to change the visible hair.

mainEntity.name: What photo works best for changing hairstyles?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use a clear front-facing or slight three-quarter portrait with the full head visible, even lighting, and minimal obstruction.

mainEntity.name: Is the AI preview an exact haircut simulation?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. It is a visual concept. Real results depend on hair texture, density, growth pattern, current length, maintenance, and professional technique.

mainEntity.name: Is Toolaze AI Hairstyle Changer free with no signup?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The standard Toolaze AI Hairstyle Changer page experience is free, with no signup and no watermark.
